author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. cpu_to_gpu_pinned() in transfer.rs — allocates PinnedHostSlice via CudaContext::alloc_pinned, copies data in, transfers via DMA
2. GpuBackend::cpu_to_gpu_pinned() trait method (defaults to regular cpu_to_gpu)
3. CudaBackendImpl implementation for f32 and f64
4. TensorStorage::on_device_pinned() — storage factory that uses pinned path for GPU targets
5. DataLoader::pin_memory(bool) builder method + is_pin_memory() query
6. Prefetch pipeline already existed from prior work
7. 810 core + 104 data + 193 gpu tests pass
